one_time_description: Prior period adjustment related to restatement of comparative figures (Note 23)
economic_notes: Welamukotok Wellness is a controlled business enterprise included in consolidation. OFN Fuels operates as an economic development enterprise. Retail Sales (Economic Development) generated $27,171,405 in revenue.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to insufficient audit evidence over Welamukotok Wellness controlled business enterprise ($439,521 revenues, $472,684 expenses, $99,337 cash, $124,959 inventory). Prior year figures restated per Note 23 with $385,365 prior period adjustment. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $385,365 to $3,004,278. Accounts receivable from government increased from $2,093,580 to $4,467,605 including ISC Child & Family Services Recovery of $1,019,108. accounts_receivable includes both note 5 ($247,077) and note 6 ($4,467,605) totalling $4,714,682. current_liabilities includes accounts payable $498,050 plus due to government $2,497,797 plus deferred revenue $3,004,278 but deferred revenue shown separately; current_liabilities here = accounts payable + due to government = $2,995,847 — adjusted to include only accounts payable $498,050 + due to government $2,497,797 = $2,995,847 plus land claim $19,521 = $3,015,368; reported as sum of non-long-term liabilities.
